events.description: Combat deep-dive (companion to AI/Movement/Multiplayer). Combat is structurally cleaner than the other subsystems — earlier task fixes hold up. But 10 NEW behavioral bugs the surface scan missed: F1 (CRITICAL: SpellBuff.ArmorBonus is write-only — 3 sect abilities silent no-op), F2 (HIGH: ranged on-hit pipeline applies at fire time not impact), F3 (HIGH: Safeguard wipes pre-existing SpellBuff), F4 (HIGH: AOE/DoT bypasses Invulnerable). Also: ALL 11 surface-scan missing-brace claims in CombatDamageHelper/ProjectileSystem/TargetingSystem are REFUTED — they're correctly-binding else clauses. Drop them from task-051's MB list.
